advanced_example.introduction: A richer official example game using localized metadata, image paths, timers, random numbers, save data, best score and rich text.
advanced_example.author: TUI GAME
advanced_example.description: Collect stars, save state, and verify richer host APIs.
advanced_example.detail: This game demonstrates language-key metadata, image icon/banner paths, save_game, save_best_score, get_key rich text, timer APIs, random APIs, layout APIs and drawing APIs. Put images at assets/images/icon.png and assets/images/banner.png.
advanced_example.title: Advanced Example
